step_rationale: IL-6R-regulated complement pathway component amplifying plaque inflammation.
mechanism: CFB participates in complement-mediated inflammation downstream of IL-6R signaling in atherosclerotic plaques.

references.title: A multi-omics approach uncovers causality of IL6R on endotypes of subclinical carotid atherosclerosis and the possible role of the IL6R/OSMR pathway.
